statement: In every magma, Equation 1161 (`x = y * ((z * (x * w)) * w)`) implies Equation 3598 (`x * y = z * ((x * w) * u)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0682
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op x w)) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op x w) u))
